where.if: AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.artist LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS id, a.title AS title, a.artist AS artist, a.genre AS genre, a.status AS status, a.cover_key AS cover_key, a.track_count AS track_count, a.goods_item_id AS goods_item_id, gi.price AS price, a.view_count AS view_count, a.release_date AS release_date, a.created_at AS created_at FROM ALBUM a LEFT JOIN GOODS_ITEM gi ON a.goods_item_id = gi.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT a.id AS id, a.goods_item_id AS goods_item_id, a.title AS title, a.artist AS artist, a.label AS label, a.genre AS genre, a.status AS status, a.release_date AS release_date, a.description AS description, a.cover_key AS cover_key, a.track_count AS track_count, a.view_count AS view_count, a.source AS source, gi.price AS price, gi.stock AS stock, a.created_at AS created_at, a.updated_at AS updated_at FROM ALBUM a LEFT JOIN GOODS_ITEM gi ON a.goods_item_id = gi.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
